nasb.text: The temple servants living in Ophel made repairs as far as the front of the Water Gate toward the east and the projecting tower.

esv.text: and the temple servants living on Ophel repaired to a point opposite the Water Gate on the east and the projecting tower.

cnv.text: 居住在俄斐勒的殿役，修築直到東面水門對面和突出的城樓那一段牆。
